## ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML**: Used appropriate tags (button, nav, main, etc.)
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav**: All interactive elements are reachable via Tab
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Added descriptive labels to icon-only buttons
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Verified text and UI elements meet WCAG AA standards
- [ ] **Focus States**: Visible focus indicators are present for all interactive elements
- [ ] **Responsiveness**: UI looks and works well on different screen sizes
